timePhrase.description: The user's original time expression only, preserved verbatim. Do not include the task topic. Examples: 最近3天, 最近一周, 最近一个月, past 3 days, last week, past month.

days.description: Integer number of recent days to collect, capped to 1..30. Map 最近3天/past 3 days to 3, 最近一周/last week/past week to 7, 最近一个月/past month to 30. If the user asks for more than one month, output 30. If vague, default to 7.

startIso.description: ISO 8601 UTC start datetime, inclusive. Compute from the current UTC time injected by the dispatcher: startIso = endIso - days days.

endIso.description: ISO 8601 UTC end datetime, exclusive. For recent windows this is the dispatcher's current UTC time.

maxItems.description: Optional maximum returned articles after sorting. Default 100. Hard maximum 300.
